complaint: I have had a cough for 3 months, and recently I noticed blood in my sputum. I also feel weak and have mild fever.

simulated_answers.cough: I have had this cough for more than 3 months now. It does not stop.
simulated_answers.how long: The cough started about 3 months ago. First it was mild then it got worse.
simulated_answers.duration: More than 3 months. I ignored it thinking it was a cold.
simulated_answers.cough duration: It has been more than 3 months. It started slowly then became worse.
simulated_answers.blood: Yes, when I cough hard I see fresh blood in the sputum. It started about 10 days ago.
simulated_answers.sputum: Yes, my sputum has blood in it. It is sometimes pink and sometimes bright red.
simulated_answers.hemoptysis: Yes, I see blood while coughing. Sometimes it is just streaks, sometimes more.
simulated_answers.blood in sputum: Yes, definitely. It started recently and it frightens me.
simulated_answers.weight loss: Yes, I have lost a lot of weight. My family says I look very thin. Maybe 6-7 kg in 2 months.
simulated_answers.weight: I have lost significant weight. My clothes are very loose now.
simulated_answers.appetite: My appetite is completely gone. I eat very little.
simulated_answers.eating: I barely eat. Food does not taste good and I feel full very quickly.
simulated_answers.night sweats: Yes, I wake up completely drenched in sweat at night. I have to change clothes.
simulated_answers.sweat: Yes, very bad night sweats. Almost every night for the past 2 months.
simulated_answers.fever: I get mild fever mostly in the evenings. Not very high but persistent.
simulated_answers.temperature: I feel hot in the evenings. Never checked temperature but it feels like mild fever.
simulated_answers.evening: Yes, the fever comes in the evenings and I feel chilly.
simulated_answers.breathing: I feel breathless even when walking slowly or climbing stairs.
simulated_answers.breathlessness: Yes, I get out of breath easily. Even small activity tires me.
simulated_answers.chest pain: Mild chest discomfort sometimes when I cough hard.
simulated_answers.contact: Yes — my cousin had tuberculosis last year. I visited him regularly at home.
simulated_answers.exposure: Yes, I have been around someone with TB — my cousin. He was treated for TB.
simulated_answers.tb: My cousin had TB last year. I did not think I would get it.
simulated_answers.family: My cousin had TB. No one else in my immediate family.
simulated_answers.smoking: Yes I smoke — about 4-5 cigarettes a day for many years.
simulated_answers.hiv: I do not know. I have never been tested.
simulated_answers.medication: Nothing specific. Just some cough syrup from the pharmacy. Did not help.
simulated_answers.symptom: Main problems are — long cough with blood, weight loss, night sweats, and mild evening fever.

tests.sputum test: AFB Smear Positive (3+) — high bacillary load
tests.cbnaat: MTB detected — Rifampicin resistance NOT detected (drug-sensitive TB)
tests.chest xray: Bilateral upper lobe infiltration with cavitation — consistent with active pulmonary TB
tests.xray: Bilateral upper lobe infiltration with cavitation — consistent with active pulmonary TB
tests.cbc: Hb: 9.8 g/dL (anemia), WBC: Normal, ESR: Elevated
